text: Hey, so my app is like not working? I tried doing the thing you said, but it just freezes. Also, my cat is sitting on my keyboard. Kind of annoying.
Hey, I was just wondering if I can get a refund for my last purchase? I really didn't like it, like, at all! Is that possible?
Hey, I didn't mean to renew my subscription, can I get a refund?
cant access my acc, says its locked? help!!! got important things in there.

Hey, so I was trying to upload a file with this weird name that has like 20 characters and it just keeps saying error. I don't get it. Is there a limit on file length or something? My friend's dog is barking like crazy too, which is super distracting!

I've been trying to use the new features that I paid for, but they are still locked for me. It's incredibly frustrating because I expected everything to be accessible right after payment. Can someone please resolve this issue? Thanks!

I was wondering if there's a way to get help for an issue that doesn’t really seem to fit in the usual categories you've outlined. I've been trying to figure this out for a while now, but my situation seems a bit different from what's typically covered. It's quite confusing and I'd appreciate any guidance you can provide.
I’m having a bit of a problm with my account, it keeps saying my password is wrong, even tho I’m sure I’m entering it corrctly. Can you help me fix this? It’s really frustrating.

I am absolutely frustrated with your service! I placed my order weeks ago, and despite the many updates saying it was shipped, I still haven’t received anything. Meanwhile, I had to cancel my plans because I was counting on getting my items on time. It’s utterly unacceptable, and it’s not just this order; I've had issues before. I feel like I’m just a number to your company. Please do something about this mess!
Dear support team, I am experiencing an issue where the application fails to load after I enter my credentials. This has been persistent for several days. Please advise on how to resolve this.
i can't access my account, the password reset link isn't sent. need help!
I can't believe this! The app keeps freezing when I try to open my messages. It's so frustrating!

Hey there, I’m having a bit of a problem with my account, like, I think my password got changed by someone else, and now I can’t get in. Can you help me with this? It’s kinda urgent and I’ve tried resetting it but it’s not working for me.

Why is it that sometimes I feel like my account is just a number to you? I really love your service but sometimes I wonder about the support. It’s frustrating because I want to ask, but I also feel like I might be bothering you.
Can you tell me why my order hasn't arrived yet? I also wanted to ask about the weather today.
I would like to request a refund for the item I ordered as it arrived defective. Thank you for your assistance in processing this request.
